props.ChoiceText: Your judgment was challenged upward, and surviving the appeal taught you how local office looks from a greater height.
props.ChoiceBio: An appeal to higher authority taught you that every bench stands under another, even when the city pretends otherwise.

0.TargetText: Someone in higher office knows your name now, for good or ill.
0.TransitionText: Because an appeal to higher authority taught you that every bench stands under another, office remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Magistrate, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Someone above the city still remembers the appeal that reached them.
